articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Asia defense summit opens amid doubts over U.S. priorities - NPR
articles.description: The Shangri-La Dialogue, hosted by the International Institute for Strategic Studies, will also address tensions in the Middle East and Russia's war on Ukraine.
articles.content: SINGAPORE China's rapid military modernization and assertiveness in the Indo-Pacific and growing concerns over American priorities are top issues on the table at Asia's premier defense summit drawing… [+4903 chars]
